vulnerable_commit_or_version: Linux 5.10 before 5.10.36; 5.11 before 5.11.20; 5.12 before 5.12.3 per NVD CPE ranges
title: s390/zcrypt zcard and zqueue hot-unplug kref mismatch
license_or_usage_note: Linux kernel source is GPL-2.0-only; NVD metadata used for discovery.
notes: NVD description states get/put mismatch for embedded kref counter and object not freed on hot unplug. Source snapshot and exact root-cause line still need resolution.

vulnerable_commit_or_version: Linux 4.8 through affected 5.13-rc ranges per NVD CPE ranges
title: RDMA/rxe cleanup path refcount underflow and use-after-free when QP creation fails

vulnerable_commit_or_version: Affected Linux kernel versions per NVD CPE ranges
title: amdtee_close_session race around kref_put and session destruction
license_or_usage_note: Linux kernel source is GPL-2.0-only; NVD metadata used for discovery.
